# terrible_community_general_kibana_plugin (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the plugin to install.

### Optional

- `allow_root` (Boolean) Whether to allow `kibana` and `kibana-plugin` to be run as root. Passes the `--allow-root` flag to these commands.
- `force` (Boolean) Delete and re-install the plugin. It can be useful for plugins update.
- `plugin_bin` (String) Location of the Kibana binary.
- `plugin_dir` (String) Your configured plugin directory specified in Kibana.
- `state` (String) Desired state of a plugin.
- `timeout` (String) Timeout setting: `30s`, `1m`, `1h` and so on.
- `url` (String) Set exact URL to download the plugin from. For local file, prefix its absolute path with `file://`.
- `version` (String) Version of the plugin to be installed. If the plugin is installed with in a previous version, it is **not** updated unless `force=true`.

### Read-Only

- `cmd` (String) The launched command during plugin management (install / remove).
